sentence_en: Let the soup simmer on low heat for about 30 minutes.
sentence_cn: 让汤在小火上慢炖大约30分钟。

sentence_en: Could you slice the tomatoes for the salad?
sentence_cn: 你能把西红柿切片做沙拉吗？

sentence_en: Stir-fry the vegetables on high heat for two minutes.
sentence_cn: 大火爆炒蔬菜两分钟。

sentence_en: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees before baking.
sentence_cn: 烘焙前先把烤箱预热到180度。

sentence_en: Marinate the chicken overnight for better flavor.
sentence_cn: 把鸡肉腌一整晚味道更好。

sentence_en: Dice the onion into small cubes.
sentence_cn: 把洋葱切成小丁。

sentence_en: Blanch the broccoli in boiling water for one minute.
sentence_cn: 把西兰花在沸水里焯一分钟。

sentence_en: Season the steak with salt and pepper before grilling.
sentence_cn: 烤牛排之前先用盐和胡椒调味。

sentence_en: Drain the pasta and set it aside.
sentence_cn: 把意面沥干水分放一边。

sentence_en: Whisk the eggs until they're fluffy.
sentence_cn: 把鸡蛋打到蓬松。

sentence_en: We can grill some burgers in the backyard.
sentence_cn: 我们可以在后院烤几个汉堡。

sentence_en: Steam the fish for about ten minutes.
sentence_cn: 把鱼蒸大约十分钟。

sentence_en: Knead the dough until it's smooth and elastic.
sentence_cn: 把面团揉到光滑有弹性。

sentence_en: Roast the vegetables in the oven with some olive oil.
sentence_cn: 用橄榄油把蔬菜放进烤箱烤。

sentence_en: Sauté the mushrooms in butter until golden brown.
sentence_cn: 用黄油把蘑菇炒到金黄色。

sentence_en: The portion size at this restaurant is huge.
sentence_cn: 这家餐厅的分量很大。

sentence_en: I'll have the leftovers for lunch tomorrow.
sentence_cn: 明天午饭我吃剩菜。

sentence_en: Can you send me the recipe for that cake?
sentence_cn: 能把那个蛋糕的食谱发给我吗？

sentence_en: We need to buy fresh ingredients for tonight's dinner.
sentence_cn: 我们需要买新鲜食材做今晚的晚餐。

sentence_en: This soup has a really rich flavor.
sentence_cn: 这个汤味道很浓郁。

sentence_en: I like my toast nice and crispy.
sentence_cn: 我喜欢吐司烤得酥脆。

sentence_en: The beef is so tender it melts in your mouth.
sentence_cn: 牛肉嫩到入口即化。

sentence_en: This pizza is a bit too greasy for me.
sentence_cn: 这个披萨对我来说有点太油腻了。

sentence_en: Just microwave it for two minutes.
sentence_cn: 微波炉加热两分钟就行。

sentence_en: Let's just order takeout tonight.
sentence_cn: 今晚咱们点外卖吧。

sentence_en: We need to check in at least two hours before the flight.
sentence_cn: 我们至少要在航班起飞前两小时办理登机。

sentence_en: We have a three-hour layover in Shanghai.
sentence_cn: 我们在上海转机，停留三小时。

sentence_en: You can download your boarding pass to your phone.
sentence_cn: 你可以把登机牌下载到手机上。

sentence_en: My luggage didn't arrive with my flight.
sentence_cn: 我的行李没有随航班到达。

sentence_en: I'll send you the itinerary for the business trip.
sentence_cn: 我把出差的行程安排发给你。

sentence_en: My commute takes about an hour each way.
sentence_cn: 我单程通勤大约一小时。

sentence_en: We had to take a detour because of road construction.
sentence_cn: 因为修路我们不得不绕道。

sentence_en: I was stuck in a traffic jam for two hours.
sentence_cn: 我堵车堵了两个小时。

sentence_en: The departure time has been delayed by 30 minutes.
sentence_cn: 出发时间延迟了30分钟。

sentence_en: What's your estimated arrival time?
sentence_cn: 你预计什么时候到？

sentence_en: Is there a currency exchange counter at the airport?
sentence_cn: 机场有货币兑换柜台吗？

sentence_en: I'm still suffering from jet lag after the trip.
sentence_cn: 旅行回来我还在倒时差。

sentence_en: I have a reservation under the name Zhang.
sentence_cn: 我有一个预订，名字是张。

sentence_en: We spent the afternoon sightseeing around the city.
sentence_cn: 我们下午在城里观光游览。

sentence_en: I bought some souvenirs for my family.
sentence_cn: 我给家人买了一些纪念品。

sentence_en: Boarding will begin in 20 minutes at Gate 5.
sentence_cn: 20分钟后在5号登机口开始登机。

sentence_en: I almost missed my connecting flight.
sentence_cn: 我差点没赶上转接航班。

sentence_en: The flight was overbooked and they offered a voucher.
sentence_cn: 航班超额预订，他们提供了代金券。

sentence_en: We had to go through customs after landing.
sentence_cn: 落地后我们需要过海关。

sentence_en: Which terminal does this airline use?
sentence_cn: 这家航空公司在哪个航站楼？

sentence_en: I prefer an aisle seat so I can stretch my legs.
sentence_cn: 我喜欢靠走道的座位，可以伸腿。

sentence_en: Put your carry-on in the overhead bin.
sentence_cn: 把随身行李放到头顶行李架上。

sentence_en: Please fasten your seatbelt due to turbulence.
sentence_cn: 遇到气流颠簸请系好安全带。

sentence_en: Where can I find ground transportation at this airport?
sentence_cn: 在机场哪里可以找到地面交通？

sentence_en: Don't forget we're changing time zones.
sentence_cn: 别忘了我们要换时区了。

sentence_en: The deadline for this project is next Friday.
sentence_cn: 这个项目的截止日期是下周五。

sentence_en: Let me check my schedule and get back to you.
sentence_cn: 让我看看日程再回复你。

sentence_en: We have a team meeting at 2 PM.
sentence_cn: 下午两点我们有个团队会议。

sentence_en: I've been working overtime all week.
sentence_cn: 我整个星期都在加班。

sentence_en: My colleagues are very supportive.
sentence_cn: 我的同事们都很支持我。

sentence_en: Please submit your report by end of day.
sentence_cn: 请在今天结束前提交你的报告。

sentence_en: I'd appreciate some feedback on my presentation.
sentence_cn: 希望你能对我的演示给些反馈。

sentence_en: She got a promotion after three years.
sentence_cn: 她三年后获得了晋升。

sentence_en: He decided to resign and start his own business.
sentence_cn: 他决定辞职自己创业。

sentence_en: I have a job interview tomorrow morning.
sentence_cn: 明天上午我有个面试。

sentence_en: Could you review my resume before I send it?
sentence_cn: 你能在我投递前帮我看看简历吗？

sentence_en: We need to prepare a pitch for the client.
sentence_cn: 我们需要为客户准备一个提案。

sentence_en: Let's brainstorm some ideas for the new campaign.
sentence_cn: 我们来头脑风暴一下新活动的创意。

sentence_en: You need to learn to delegate tasks to your team.
sentence_cn: 你需要学会把任务委派给团队。

sentence_en: We used industry benchmarks to evaluate our performance.
sentence_cn: 我们用行业基准来评估我们的表现。

sentence_en: The quarterly report is due next week.
sentence_cn: 季度报告下周到期。

sentence_en: All stakeholders need to approve this proposal.
sentence_cn: 所有利益相关方都需要批准这个提案。

sentence_en: The onboarding process takes about two weeks.
sentence_cn: 入职培训流程大约需要两周。

sentence_en: The company will reimburse your travel expenses.
sentence_cn: 公司会报销你的差旅费用。

sentence_en: We need to ensure compliance with the new regulations.
sentence_cn: 我们需要确保符合新规定。

sentence_en: Please complete the handover before your last day.
sentence_cn: 请在离职前完成交接。

sentence_en: Did you meet your KPIs this quarter?
sentence_cn: 这个季度你达到KPI了吗？

sentence_en: Let's have a quick standup every morning at 9.
sentence_cn: 每天早上9点开个简短站会。

sentence_en: The approval process is a real bottleneck.
sentence_cn: 审批流程是个真正的瓶颈。

sentence_en: We need a more scalable solution.
sentence_cn: 我们需要一个更具扩展性的方案。

sentence_en: I don't have the bandwidth to take on another project.
sentence_cn: 我没有精力再接一个项目了。

sentence_en: Let's sync up on the project status tomorrow.
sentence_cn: 明天我们同步一下项目状态。

sentence_en: Let me loop in the design team on this.
sentence_cn: 我把设计团队也拉进来讨论这个。

sentence_en: We need the manager to sign off on this.
sentence_cn: 我们需要经理签字确认这个。

sentence_en: What were the main takeaways from the meeting?
sentence_cn: 会议的主要收获是什么？

sentence_en: Let's grab coffee and catch up sometime.
sentence_cn: 找个时间喝咖啡叙叙旧吧。

sentence_en: Do you want to hang out this weekend?
sentence_cn: 这周末要不要一起出去玩？

sentence_en: I get along really well with my neighbors.
sentence_cn: 我和邻居相处得很好。

sentence_en: We hit it off right from the start.
sentence_cn: 我们一开始就特别投缘。

sentence_en: He stood me up last night, didn't even text.
sentence_cn: 他昨晚放我鸽子，连短信都没发。

sentence_en: I'm sorry I missed your birthday. Let me make it up to you.
sentence_cn: 抱歉错过了你的生日，让我补偿你。

sentence_en: I'm not good at small talk at parties.
sentence_cn: 我不太擅长在派对上闲聊。

sentence_en: We bonded over our shared love of cooking.
sentence_cn: 我们因为共同热爱烹饪而建立了感情。

sentence_en: Let's keep in touch after you move.
sentence_cn: 你搬走之后我们保持联系。

sentence_en: Feel free to reach out if you need anything.
sentence_cn: 有需要随时联系我。

sentence_en: He was my wingman at the bar last night.
sentence_cn: 他昨晚在酒吧给我当僚机。

sentence_en: He's more of an acquaintance than a close friend.
sentence_cn: 他与其说是好朋友，不如说是熟人。

sentence_en: I'm an introvert, so big parties drain me.
sentence_cn: 我是内向的人，大型派对让我很疲惫。

sentence_en: She's such an extrovert, she talks to everyone.
sentence_cn: 她特别外向，跟谁都能聊。

sentence_en: There was an awkward silence after his comment.
sentence_cn: 他说完之后气氛很尴尬。

sentence_en: This cafe has a really chill vibe.
sentence_cn: 这家咖啡馆氛围很放松。

sentence_en: He ghosted me after the second date.
sentence_cn: 第二次约会后他就突然消失了。

sentence_en: I think she's starting to catch feelings.
sentence_cn: 我觉得她开始动感情了。

sentence_en: A good joke can really break the ice.
sentence_cn: 一个好的笑话真的能打破僵局。

sentence_en: Let's make sure we're on the same page.
sentence_cn: 我们先确认大家想法一致。

sentence_en: I felt like a third wheel on their date.
sentence_cn: 我觉得自己在他们约会时像电灯泡。

sentence_en: We clicked immediately at the party.
sentence_cn: 我们在派对上立刻就合得来了。

sentence_en: No hard feelings, right? We're still friends?
sentence_cn: 不记仇对吧？我们还是朋友？

sentence_en: There's a clique at work that always eats together.
sentence_cn: 公司里有个小圈子总是一起吃饭。

sentence_en: We had a really good heart-to-heart last night.
sentence_cn: 昨晚我们好好地交心谈了一次。

sentence_en: Oh my bad, I forgot to reply to your message.
sentence_cn: 我的错，忘记回你消息了。

sentence_en: Hey! Long time no see, how have you been?
sentence_cn: 嘿！好久不见，你最近怎么样？

sentence_en: Speak of the devil, here comes John!
sentence_cn: 说曹操曹操到，John来了！

sentence_en: If you need anything, just hit me up.
sentence_cn: 有需要随时找我。

sentence_en: Don't worry about it, it's no big deal.
sentence_cn: 别担心，没什么大不了的。

sentence_en: I've been really stressed out about the deadline.
sentence_cn: 截止日期让我压力很大。

sentence_en: I feel completely burned out after this project.
sentence_cn: 这个项目之后我感觉完全精疲力竭了。

sentence_en: I always feel anxious before presentations.
sentence_cn: 演讲前我总是很焦虑。

sentence_en: I'm overwhelmed with all these tasks.
sentence_cn: 这么多任务让我不堪重负。

sentence_en: She's been down in the dumps since she lost her job.
sentence_cn: 她失业后一直心情低落。

sentence_en: Cheer up! Things will get better.
sentence_cn: 振作起来！事情会好起来的。

sentence_en: I go to the gym to blow off steam after work.
sentence_cn: 下班后我去健身房释放压力。

sentence_en: I'm in a really good mood today.
sentence_cn: 我今天心情特别好。

sentence_en: He's always grumpy before his morning coffee.
sentence_cn: 他早上喝咖啡之前总是很暴躁。

sentence_en: Self-care is not selfish, it's necessary.
sentence_cn: 自我关爱不是自私，而是必要的。

sentence_en: I just need to vent about my day.
sentence_cn: 我就是需要倾诉一下今天的事。

sentence_en: Having insurance gives me peace of mind.
sentence_cn: 有保险让我安心。

sentence_en: I've been on edge all day waiting for the results.
sentence_cn: 等结果一整天我都紧张不安。

sentence_en: Sometimes you just need to let off steam.
sentence_cn: 有时候你就是需要发泄一下。

sentence_en: Take a deep breath and calm down.
sentence_cn: 深呼吸，冷静一下。

sentence_en: She had a breakdown from all the pressure.
sentence_cn: 她在所有压力下崩溃了。

sentence_en: Practicing gratitude can improve your mental health.
sentence_cn: 练习感恩可以改善心理健康。

sentence_en: Kids are more resilient than we think.
sentence_cn: 孩子比我们想象的更有韧性。

sentence_en: I have serious fomo about missing the party.
sentence_cn: 错过派对让我有严重的错失恐惧。

sentence_en: I like to read to unwind before bed.
sentence_cn: 我喜欢睡前看书来放松。

sentence_en: She's been really moody lately.
sentence_cn: 她最近情绪很不稳定。

sentence_en: Going to therapy was the best decision I made.
sentence_cn: 去做心理治疗是我做过最好的决定。

sentence_en: That topic is a trigger for her.
sentence_cn: 那个话题会触发她的情绪。

sentence_en: How do you cope with work stress?
sentence_cn: 你是怎么应对工作压力的？

sentence_en: Mindfulness meditation helps me stay focused.
sentence_cn: 正念冥想帮助我保持专注。

sentence_en: Sorry for the rant, I just needed to get it out.
sentence_cn: 抱歉吐槽这么多，我只是需要说出来。

sentence_en: We all carry some emotional baggage from the past.
sentence_cn: 我们都带着过去的一些情感包袱。

sentence_en: It's important to set boundaries in relationships.
sentence_cn: 在关系中设定界限很重要。

sentence_en: That friendship was really toxic for me.
sentence_cn: 那段友谊对我来说真的很有害。

sentence_en: Being self-aware is the first step to growth.
sentence_cn: 有自我意识是成长的第一步。

sentence_en: I'd like to request a refund for this item.
sentence_cn: 我想申请这个商品的退款。

sentence_en: Is this product covered under warranty?
sentence_cn: 这个产品有保修吗？

sentence_en: Please keep your receipt for returns.
sentence_cn: 请保留小票以便退货。

sentence_en: Can I exchange this for a different size?
sentence_cn: 我能换个不同的尺码吗？

sentence_en: Is there a discount for members?
sentence_cn: 会员有折扣吗？

sentence_en: I have a coupon for 20% off.
sentence_cn: 我有一张八折优惠券。

sentence_en: Sorry, this item is currently out of stock.
sentence_cn: 抱歉，这个商品目前缺货。

sentence_en: Can I try on these shoes in size 42?
sentence_cn: 我能试穿42码的鞋吗？

sentence_en: You can try it out for 30 days.
sentence_cn: 你可以试用30天。

sentence_en: These shoes are on sale for half price.
sentence_cn: 这些鞋半价促销。

sentence_en: I think I was overcharged for my meal.
sentence_cn: 我觉得我的饭被多收了钱。

sentence_en: The product I received was defective.
sentence_cn: 我收到的产品有缺陷。

sentence_en: When is the expected delivery date?
sentence_cn: 预计什么时候送到？

sentence_en: Do you have a tracking number for my order?
sentence_cn: 我的订单有物流单号吗？

sentence_en: Can I pay in installments?
sentence_cn: 我可以分期付款吗？

sentence_en: Everything in this section is on clearance.
sentence_cn: 这个区域所有东西都在清仓甩卖。

sentence_en: Do you offer price match with online stores?
sentence_cn: 你们提供和网店的价格匹配吗？

sentence_en: The cashier forgot to scan one of my items.
sentence_cn: 收银员忘了扫我一个商品。

sentence_en: The barcode won't scan, can you check the price?
sentence_cn: 条形码扫不出来，你能查下价格吗？

sentence_en: This jacket was a real bargain at 50% off.
sentence_cn: 这件夹克五折买到真是划算。

sentence_en: The syllabus for this course is very detailed.
sentence_cn: 这门课的教学大纲非常详细。

sentence_en: The assignment deadline is next Monday.
sentence_cn: 作业截止日期是下周一。

sentence_en: Stop procrastinating and start studying.
sentence_cn: 别拖延了，开始学习吧。

sentence_en: I had to cram all night before the exam.
sentence_cn: 考试前我不得不通宵突击。

sentence_en: I always take notes during lectures.
sentence_cn: 上课时我总是做笔记。

sentence_en: Let's review the material from last week.
sentence_cn: 我们来复习上周的内容。

sentence_en: I hired a math tutor for my son.
sentence_cn: 我给儿子请了数学家教。

sentence_en: She won a full scholarship to university.
sentence_cn: 她获得了全额奖学金上大学。

sentence_en: I want to enroll in a coding bootcamp.
sentence_cn: 我想报名参加编程训练营。

sentence_en: I got a certificate in project management.
sentence_cn: 我拿到了项目管理证书。

sentence_en: There's a writing workshop this Saturday.
sentence_cn: 这周六有个写作工作坊。

sentence_en: I'm doing a lot of self-study on machine learning.
sentence_cn: 我在自学很多机器学习的内容。

sentence_en: I need to finish my thesis before the deadline.
sentence_cn: 我需要在截止日期前完成论文。

sentence_en: This semester I'm taking five courses.
sentence_cn: 这学期我选了五门课。

sentence_en: My GPA dropped after last semester.
sentence_cn: 上学期后我的绩点下降了。

sentence_en: I'm still working on my master's thesis.
sentence_cn: 我还在写硕士论文。

sentence_en: I got an internship at a tech company.
sentence_cn: 我在一家科技公司拿到了实习机会。

sentence_en: The curriculum covers both theory and practice.
sentence_cn: 课程体系涵盖理论和实践。

sentence_en: Our study group meets every Wednesday.
sentence_cn: 我们学习小组每周三聚会。

sentence_en: I use flashcards to memorize vocabulary.
sentence_cn: 我用记忆卡片来背单词。

sentence_en: I need to do the laundry this weekend.
sentence_cn: 这周末我得洗衣服。

sentence_en: Can you vacuum the living room?
sentence_cn: 你能用吸尘器清理客厅吗？

sentence_en: I'll mop the kitchen floor after dinner.
sentence_cn: 晚饭后我来拖厨房地板。

sentence_en: Don't forget to dust the shelves.
sentence_cn: 别忘了擦架子上的灰。

sentence_en: Can you take out the trash before bed?
sentence_cn: 睡前能把垃圾倒了吗？

sentence_en: Please load the dishwasher after dinner.
sentence_cn: 晚饭后请把碗放进洗碗机。

sentence_en: I need to organize my closet this weekend.
sentence_cn: 这周末我需要整理衣柜。

sentence_en: It's time to declutter the garage.
sentence_cn: 是时候清理车库的杂物了。

sentence_en: Can you fix the leaky faucet?
sentence_cn: 你能修一下漏水的水龙头吗？

sentence_en: We need to call a plumber for the clogged drain.
sentence_cn: 下水道堵了，我们需要叫水管工。

sentence_en: Regular maintenance keeps the house in good shape.
sentence_cn: 定期维护让房子保持良好状态。

sentence_en: The kitchen renovation took three months.
sentence_cn: 厨房装修花了三个月。

sentence_en: Could you turn up the thermostat? It's cold.
sentence_cn: 能把温控器调高吗？太冷了。

sentence_en: The fuse blew when I turned on the microwave.
sentence_cn: 我开微波炉的时候保险丝烧了。

sentence_en: I need to contact the landlord about the broken heater.
sentence_cn: 暖气坏了我得联系房东。

sentence_en: Rent is due on the first of every month.
sentence_cn: 每月一号交房租。

sentence_en: We got our security deposit back when we moved out.
sentence_cn: 搬走时我们拿回了押金。

sentence_en: The utility bill went up this month.
sentence_cn: 这个月水电费涨了。

sentence_en: We need to buy some new furniture for the living room.
sentence_cn: 客厅需要买些新家具。

sentence_en: We're having a housewarming party next Saturday.
sentence_cn: 下周六我们办乔迁聚会。

explain: 晶圆（半导体制造基底材料）
sentence_en: The 300mm wafer is the industry standard for advanced node production.
sentence_cn: 300mm晶圆是先进制程量产的行业标准。

explain: 光刻胶（光刻工艺中的感光材料）
sentence_en: We need to rework the wafer because the photoresist coating was non-uniform.
sentence_cn: 需要返工，因为光刻胶涂布不均匀。

explain: 刻蚀（去除材料形成图案）
sentence_en: The dry etch process achieved an anisotropy of 95%.
sentence_cn: 干法刻蚀工艺实现了95%的各向异性。

explain: 沉积/淀积（在晶圆上生长薄膜）
sentence_en: The CVD deposition thickness needs to be controlled within ±2%.
sentence_cn: CVD沉积厚度需要控制在±2%以内。

explain: 离子注入（向半导体中掺入杂质）
sentence_en: Ion implantation is used to form the source/drain regions.
sentence_cn: 离子注入用于形成源/漏区。

explain: 退火（热处理激活掺杂或修复损伤）
sentence_en: Rapid thermal annealing at 1050°C activates the implanted dopants.
sentence_cn: 1050°C快速退火激活注入的掺杂剂。

sentence_en: All wafer handling must be done in a Class 100 cleanroom.
sentence_cn: 所有晶圆操作必须在百级洁净室中进行。

explain: 光刻（用光将电路图案转移到晶圆上）
sentence_en: EUV lithography is essential for patterning at the 5nm node and below.
sentence_cn: EUV光刻对于5nm及以下节点的图案化至关重要。

sentence_en: Copper metallization replaced aluminum for lower resistance.
sentence_cn: 铜金属化取代了铝以降低电阻。

explain: 通孔/过孔（连接不同金属层的孔）
sentence_en: The via fill process ensures reliable connection between metal layers.
sentence_cn: 通孔填充工艺确保金属层之间的可靠连接。

explain: 化学机械抛光（平坦化工艺）
sentence_en: CMP is critical for achieving global planarization in multi-layer metallization.
sentence_cn: CMP对于多层金属化实现全局平坦化至关重要。

sentence_en: High film stress can cause wafer warpage after deposition.
sentence_cn: 高薄膜应力会导致沉积后晶圆翘曲。

explain: 颗粒（洁净室中的污染物）
sentence_en: We found particles on the wafer surface after the etch step.
sentence_cn: 刻蚀后发现晶圆表面有颗粒。

explain: 工艺配方（制程参数集合）
sentence_en: We need to optimize the etch recipe for better selectivity.
sentence_cn: 我们需要优化刻蚀配方以提高选择比。

sentence_en: The gate oxide thickness is critical for transistor performance.
sentence_cn: 栅氧化层厚度对晶体管性能至关重要。

explain: 扩散（杂质在半导体中的热扩散）
sentence_en: Thermal diffusion is used for deep junction formation.
sentence_cn: 热扩散用于形成深结。

sentence_en: Sputtering is used to deposit the metal seed layer.
sentence_cn: 溅射用于沉积金属种子层。

explain: 外延（在衬底上生长单晶层）
sentence_en: The epitaxy process grows a defect-free silicon layer on the substrate.
sentence_cn: 外延工艺在衬底上生长无缺陷的硅层。

explain: 光刻套刻精度（层间对准误差）
sentence_en: The litho overlay spec for this layer is ±3nm.
sentence_cn: 这层的光刻套刻精度规格为±3nm。

explain: 等离子体（刻蚀和沉积的工作气体状态）
sentence_en: The plasma etch rate depends on the RF power and gas flow.
sentence_cn: 等离子体刻蚀速率取决于射频功率和气体流量。

explain: 寄存器传输级（芯片设计描述层）
sentence_en: The RTL code needs to pass lint check before synthesis.
sentence_cn: RTL代码在综合前需要通过lint检查。

sentence_en: Logic synthesis converts RTL to a gate-level netlist.
sentence_cn: 逻辑综合将RTL转换为门级网表。

explain: 网表（电路连接描述文件）
sentence_en: The synthesized netlist has 2 million gates.
sentence_cn: 综合后的网表有200万个门。

sentence_en: All paths must meet timing in STA before tapeout.
sentence_cn: 流片前所有路径必须通过STA时序分析。

sentence_en: We need to fix all DRC violations before signoff.
sentence_cn: 签核前我们需要修复所有DRC违规。

explain: 版图与原理图一致性检查
sentence_en: LVS must be clean to ensure the layout matches the schematic.
sentence_cn: LVS必须通过以确保版图与原理图一致。

explain: 布局规划（芯片版图的整体规划）
sentence_en: The floorplan needs to be optimized for better routability.
sentence_cn: 布局规划需要优化以提高可布线性。

explain: 布局布线（自动放置单元并连线）
sentence_en: Place and route took 12 hours for this large design.
sentence_cn: 这个大型设计的布局布线花了12小时。

explain: 时序收敛（满足所有时序要求）
sentence_en: We achieved timing closure after three iterations of ECO.
sentence_cn: 经过三轮ECO后我们实现了时序收敛。

explain: 工程变更单（小范围设计修改）
sentence_en: We did an ECO to fix the hold time violation.
sentence_cn: 我们做了一次ECO来修复保持时间违规。

explain: 电源网络（芯片供电结构）
sentence_en: The power grid design must ensure IR drop is within budget.
sentence_cn: 电源网络设计必须确保IR压降在预算内。

sentence_en: Clock tree synthesis minimizes skew across the chip.
sentence_cn: 时钟树综合使芯片上的偏斜最小化。

sentence_en: We're targeting signoff by end of this month.
sentence_cn: 我们的目标是本月底完成签核。

explain: 流片/投片（设计完成送交制造）
sentence_en: The tapeout deadline is next Friday.
sentence_cn: 流片截止日期是下周五。

sentence_en: We licensed the DDR controller IP core from a third party.
sentence_cn: 我们从第三方授权了DDR控制器IP核。

explain: 片上系统（集成多功能的芯片）
sentence_en: This SoC integrates CPU, GPU, and modem on one die.
sentence_cn: 这个SoC将CPU、GPU和基带集成在一颗芯片上。

sentence_en: We prototyped the design on an FPGA before taping out.
sentence_cn: 流片前我们用FPGA做了原型验证。

sentence_en: The simulation results match the expected behavior.
sentence_cn: 仿真结果与预期行为一致。

sentence_en: Functional verification covers 95% of the design scenarios.
sentence_cn: 功能验证覆盖了95%的设计场景。

sentence_en: The timing constraints file defines all clock frequencies.
sentence_cn: 时序约束文件定义了所有时钟频率。

explain: 引线键合（芯片与封装的电气连接）
sentence_en: Gold wire bonding is being replaced by copper for cost reduction.
sentence_cn: 金线键合正被铜线取代以降低成本。

explain: 装片（将芯片固定到封装基板）
sentence_en: Die attach accuracy must be within ±25μm.
sentence_cn: 装片精度必须在±25μm以内。

sentence_en: The mold compound must withstand reflow temperatures up to 260°C.
sentence_cn: 封装树脂必须能承受260°C的回流焊温度。

sentence_en: The BGA substrate has 6 layers of routing.
sentence_cn: BGA封装基板有6层布线。

sentence_en: The solder ball pitch is 0.4mm for this BGA package.
sentence_cn: 这个BGA封装的焊球间距是0.4mm。

explain: 底部填充（增强焊点可靠性）
sentence_en: Underfill is applied after flip-chip bonding to improve reliability.
sentence_cn: 倒装焊后施加底部填充以提高可靠性。

explain: 倒装芯片（面朝下焊接的封装方式）
sentence_en: Flip chip packaging offers better electrical performance than wire bonding.
sentence_cn: 倒装芯片封装比引线键合具有更好的电气性能。

sentence_en: 3D packaging enables higher memory bandwidth in HBM.
sentence_cn: 3D封装在HBM中实现了更高的存储带宽。

sentence_en: The thermal pad on the exposed die improves heat dissipation.
sentence_cn: 裸露芯片上的散热焊盘改善了散热。

explain: 引线框架（传统封装的金属框架）
sentence_en: QFN packages use a copper leadframe.
sentence_cn: QFN封装使用铜引线框架。

sentence_en: The ATE program runs a full functional test in under 2 seconds.
sentence_cn: ATE程序在2秒内完成全部功能测试。

explain: 探针卡（晶圆测试用的接口板）
sentence_en: The probe card needs recalibration after testing 1000 wafers.
sentence_cn: 探针卡在测试1000片晶圆后需要重新校准。

explain: 测试向量（测试用的输入信号序列）
sentence_en: We need to generate test vectors for the new功能.
sentence_cn: 我们需要为新功能生成测试向量。

sentence_en: DFT logic includes scan chains and BIST controllers.
sentence_cn: DFT逻辑包括扫描链和BIST控制器。

explain: 扫描链（串行测试数据通路）
sentence_en: Scan chain testing shifts in test patterns and captures responses.
sentence_cn: 扫描链测试移入测试模式并捕获响应。

sentence_en: Memory BIST runs at-speed tests on embedded SRAM.
sentence_cn: 存储器BIST对嵌入式SRAM进行全速测试。

sentence_en: We need to book tester time for the production run.
sentence_cn: 我们需要预约测试机时间进行量产测试。

sentence_en: The test program was updated to include the new test items.
sentence_cn: 测试程序已更新以包含新的测试项。

explain: 拼车流片（多项目共用晶圆）
sentence_en: We're using a shuttle run to save on mask costs.
sentence_cn: 我们使用拼车流片来节省掩膜成本。

explain: 封装（芯片的外壳保护结构）
sentence_en: The QFN package is popular for consumer electronics.
sentence_cn: QFN封装在消费电子中很流行。

explain: 良率/成品率（合格芯片占比）
sentence_en: The yield for this lot dropped to 85% due to particle contamination.
sentence_cn: 这批晶圆因颗粒污染良率降至85%。

explain: 缺陷密度（单位面积缺陷数）
sentence_en: We need to reduce the defect density below 0.1 per cm².
sentence_cn: 我们需要将缺陷密度降至0.1个/cm²以下。

explain: 晶圆图（显示每颗芯片的测试结果）
sentence_en: The wafer map shows a cluster of failures in the edge region.
sentence_cn: 晶圆图显示边缘区域有一片失效集中区。

explain: 分档/分级（按测试结果分类芯片）
sentence_en: Chips that fail speed testing are sorted into a lower bin.
sentence_cn: 速度测试不通过的芯片被分到较低档位。

sentence_en: The WAT results show all parameters are within spec.
sentence_cn: WAT测试结果所有参数都在规格内。

sentence_en: CP test is done before dicing to screen out bad dies.
sentence_cn: CP测试在切割前进行以筛除不良芯片。

sentence_en: FT test is the last quality gate before shipping.
sentence_cn: FT测试是出货前的最后一道质量关卡。

sentence_en: We need to investigate the yield outliers in this lot.
sentence_cn: 我们需要调查这批晶圆中的良率异常值。

explain: 帕累托分析（按影响排序）
sentence_en: The Pareto chart shows that particle defects are the top yield limiter.
sentence_cn: 帕累托图显示颗粒缺陷是良率的首要限制因素。

sentence_en: We detected a yield excursion and stopped the line.
sentence_cn: 我们检测到良率异常波动并停线。

sentence_en: The photoresist rework saved 90% of the affected wafers.
sentence_cn: 光刻胶返工挽救了90%受影响的晶圆。

explain: 报废（无法修复的不良品）
sentence_en: We had to scrap 5 wafers due to severe contamination.
sentence_cn: 由于严重污染我们不得不报废5片晶圆。

explain: 批次（一起加工的一组晶圆）
sentence_en: This lot of 25 wafers just completed the metal deposition step.
sentence_cn: 这批25片晶圆刚完成金属沉积工序。

explain: 生产周期（从投片到产出的时间）
sentence_en: We need to reduce the cycle time from 45 days to 35 days.
sentence_cn: 我们需要将生产周期从45天缩短到35天。

explain: 产能/产出量（单位时间产量）
sentence_en: The new stepper increased litho throughput by 30%.
sentence_cn: 新的步进机将光刻产能提升了30%。

sentence_en: The new EUV stepper costs over $150 million.
sentence_cn: 新的EUV步进机成本超过1.5亿美元。

sentence_en: The scanner offers better overlay accuracy than the stepper.
sentence_cn: 扫描式光刻机比步进机提供更好的套刻精度。

sentence_en: The etch tool needs a chamber clean after 500 wafers.
sentence_cn: 刻蚀设备在处理500片晶圆后需要腔体清洗。

sentence_en: The CVD tool deposits the silicon nitride passivation layer.
sentence_cn: CVD设备沉积氮化硅钝化层。

sentence_en: PVD is used to deposit the titanium barrier layer.
sentence_cn: PVD用于沉积钛阻挡层。

sentence_en: The furnace processes 100 wafers per batch.
sentence_cn: 扩散炉每批处理100片晶圆。

sentence_en: The spin coater applies photoresist at 3000 RPM.
sentence_cn: 旋涂机以3000转涂布光刻胶。

sentence_en: The developer removes the exposed photoresist.
sentence_cn: 显影机去除曝光后的光刻胶。

explain: 量测设备（测量薄膜厚度、CD等）
sentence_en: Metrology tools verify the critical dimensions after etch.
sentence_cn: 量测设备在刻蚀后验证关键尺寸。

explain: 检测设备（检查缺陷和颗粒）
sentence_en: The inspection tool found 3 particles on the wafer.
sentence_cn: 检测设备在晶圆上发现了3个颗粒。

explain: 研磨液（CMP用的化学研磨浆料）
sentence_en: The CMP slurry contains silica particles for polishing.
sentence_cn: CMP研磨液含有用于抛光的二氧化硅颗粒。

sentence_en: We need to replace the copper target in the PVD tool.
sentence_cn: 我们需要更换PVD设备中的铜靶材。

explain: 前驱体（CVD用的气态化学原料）
sentence_en: The precursor gas is delivered to the CVD chamber.
sentence_cn: 前驱体气体被输送到CVD腔体。

explain: 工艺气体（刻蚀和沉积用的特种气体）
sentence_en: The process gas flow rate affects the etch profile.
sentence_cn: 工艺气体流量影响刻蚀形貌。

explain: 掩膜版（光刻用的图案模板）
sentence_en: Each layer requires a unique mask for patterning.
sentence_cn: 每层都需要一个专用掩膜版进行图案化。

explain: 掩模（光刻用的缩小版图案）
sentence_en: The reticle defect inspection is done before production.
sentence_cn: 生产前进行掩模缺陷检查。

sentence_en: The resist thickness affects the lithography resolution.
sentence_cn: 抗蚀剂厚度影响光刻分辨率。

sentence_en: The solvent strips the remaining photoresist after etch.
sentence_cn: 溶剂在刻蚀后去除残留的光刻胶。

explain: 掺杂剂（改变半导体电性的杂质）
sentence_en: Phosphorus is used as an N-type dopant in silicon.
sentence_cn: 磷被用作硅中的N型掺杂剂。

sentence_en: We are tapeout-ready and the foundry confirmed the wafer start date.
sentence_cn: 我们已准备好流片，代工厂确认了投片日期。

sentence_en: The fab operates 24/7 with over 1000 employees.
sentence_cn: 晶圆工厂全天候运营，有超过1000名员工。

sentence_en: The 3nm node uses FinFET or GAA transistors.
sentence_cn: 3nm节点使用FinFET或GAA晶体管。

explain: 芯片裸片（晶圆上的单个芯片单元）
sentence_en: Each 300mm wafer contains over 500 dies for this design.
sentence_cn: 每片300mm晶圆包含超过500颗裸片。

explain: 切割/划片（将晶圆分成单颗芯片）
sentence_en: Laser dicing offers cleaner cuts than blade dicing.
sentence_cn: 激光切割比刀片切割切口更干净。

sentence_en: The passivation layer protects the die from moisture and contamination.
sentence_cn: 钝化层保护裸片免受湿气和污染。
